llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Lead - Technical Development, FSL and Head - PU Application Development Lab
job.description: About the Role Support customers and Sales (Marketing) on technical solution thru Technical Service/ development and drive PMU Project management. Identify their needs and market opportunities in the field of PU Systems thru Technical Marketing / Technical Development and Service for mutual growth. Establish the Material Technical solution (PU system), material processing smoothly at customer site, product development, fine tuning. Handling customer complaints, coordinate with lab for developments and quality complaints, etc., How You Will Do It Technical services and Business Development in India Identify and develop new applications for PM portfolio in Polyurethane systems for Footwear, Sports and Leisure business Initiate new product development fine tune formulation to meet customer needs in his region and his expertise in India with close coordination with TD team (Country Region) Align technical services and application development with local sales or country needs to achieve success troubleshooting requirements for existing and new business. Manage resources with close coordination with TS sales team to achieve defined targets. Pursue customer driven innovations / New application and manage joint development projects with full accountability Collaborate with Internal /External stake holders of business value chain partner for new business development Facilitate Formulation development with the lab and region in collaboration with PD Team Ensure closure of Timely NCM resolution, liquidation of non-moving /aged stock and settlement of customer issues Serve as a liaison between Country TD, PD and respective Region team to translate success stories into business growth. Key Shared Accountabilities Regional Industry Team: With Industry Team Marketing: Initiate product portfolio development of industry Contributes educate regional TD,TS team on product/application/ process challenges Participates in regional TS activities (Trials, new system developments, R D topics) With Operations With sales Industry marketing: Align with segment strategies, coordinates TD and PD activities in alignment with country and regional leadership. Thane / Dahej site - Contribute for Polyol Product improvement Standardization of Lab developed product to actual production Work closely with QA team for TS support / fine tuning Localization of C-A thru substitution of equivalent /better quality alternate RM Parameter for success Financial Metrics Cost of quality – No product...
